title: habenaria garayana
intro: Habenaria garayana, also known as the Garay's Habenaria, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Habenaria garayana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. The plant is typically harvested for its leaves and roots, which can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use.
